## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant local checks or validation workflow.
- [ ] I updated documentation when changing setup behavior.
- [ ] I did not add credentials, client data, private URLs, or generated local config.
- [ ] I preserved unrelated MCP client configuration and added regression coverage for config/reset changes.
